37decda4-fc12-4eb9-b788-10e4df6d7945;5d3284cb-fe10-46b1-bc9a-16b3b3fd228d;6a190ba8-539b-4f45-bbd8-85c3beb3db7b;🔥 Quang Duong Signs New APP Deal — Key Takeaways from His Father’s Podcast with Zane Navratil;"❤️‍🔥 Just a few hours ago
column2: Quang Duong’s father shared some details about Quang Duong’s new contract with the APP during a podcast with Zane Navratil. Here are a few key points from the conversation:

column1: No details were mentioned about salary or the total value of the contract.
Quang Duong is required to play 4 tournaments per year in the U.S. and 4 DJoy events
column2: while the rest of his schedule is flexible — he can compete wherever he wants.

column1: The reason QD did not return to the PPA Tour is that the income there would only be about one-fifth of what he’s making now
column2: while his current deal allows him to travel and compete around the world.

column1: 🫡 Quang Duong’s father also said that APP is heading in the right direction and could surpass the PPA within 6 months to a year. At that point
column2: I felt he started rambling a bit
column3: so I stopped listening… because some of you might remember that not long ago he also said pickleball in Asia would grow very quickly
column4: yet in the end QD signed with what many consider the second-tier league in the U.S. 😬

e8325fc9-bdae-47eb-a2eb-3ccb42ef9955;5d3284cb-fe10-46b1-bc9a-16b3b3fd228d;6a190ba8-539b-4f45-bbd8-85c3beb3db7b;Quick Review: Joola V Kosmos — So Good-Looking It Makes You Forget Other Brands (For a Moment);"Quick Review: Joola V Kosmos – good-looking enough to make you… temporarily forget other brands
Today I got to test the Joola V – Kosmos edition in green
The color is absolutely beautiful.
🎨 Looks: seriously impressive
The green color with a monolith-style pattern looks really sharp. The moment you hold it
column2: you can tell Joola’s design team this time actually paid attention to what players want visually. It just feels much more modern when placed next to another paddle.

column1: However… one question remains.
Has Joola fixed the edge guard issue yet?
They probably need to make that clear to users to avoid situations like with the Joola IV
column2: where removing the edge tape could end up peeling the paint underneath. And if that happens again
column3: the real question is: will it be covered under warranty or not?

column1: 🎾 On-court feel (for an amateur like me)… it somehow feels like I leveled up
Resets: soft and controlled
Spin: just the right amount
Drives: very solid feeling
The paddle has that nice
column3: with a weight that seems just right to produce clean shots.

column1: I usually hit hook-style topspin drops
column2: and today it oddly felt… perfectly dialed in.
